title: Spanish Potato Pancakes
description: A crispy Spanish twist on traditional potato pancakes, made with a delicious blend of potatoes, salty cheese, and a hint of chewy texture.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a bowl, mix together grated potatoes, chopped olives, grated cheese, and chopped almonds.
Add 1-2 tablespoons of water to the bowl to help hold the mixture together.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the potato mixture onto the pan to form patties.
Cook the patties for 3-4 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the Spanish potato pancakes hot with your favorite toppings.
